calendar.matters:
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Mar-24-2020 Off Calendar

Notice Of Motion And Motion For Judgment On The Pleadings
Off Calendar Feb-27-2020 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances:
Roger Jackson, Esq., T:707.318.2994, specially appearing for the plaintiff;
No other appearance.

RULING: There being no objection, the Court adopted its tentative ruling as follows:

PLAINTIFF PORTFOLIO RECOVERY ASSOCIATES, LLC's Motion For Judgment On The Pleadings is Granted. No opposition filed.

Order and Judgment were signed in open court.

Judge: Ethan P. Schulman; Clerk: Gina Gonzales; Court Reporter: Maria A. Torreano CSR#8600, email: maria.torreano@gmail.com

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Dec-30-2019 Continued To Apr-15-20 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

Notice Of Motion & Motion For Order That Matters In Request For Admission Of Truth Of Facts Be Admitted
Off Calendar Nov-06-2019 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances:
Vivian Leung, Esq., Attorney at Law, 415-680-5731, Specially appearing for Plaintiff;
No other appearance.

Party stipulate to the Judge Pro Tem.

The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

PLAINTIFF PORTFOLIO RECOVERY ASSOCIATES, LLC Motion For Order That Matters In Request For Admission Of Truth Of Facts Be Admitted

Plaintiff's motion that Matters in Request for Admissions of Truth of Facts Be Admitted is unopposed and granted. A copy of the Order to be entered herein shall be served with Notice of Entry. A true copy of the Requests for Admissions which is the subject of the motion shall be attached to the Order as an exhibit. Moving party to prepare and submit a proposed order in compliance with CRC 3.1312 and approved as to form to Judge Pro Tem Steven Stein by email at sbs@sbslawsf.com. Judge Pro Tem: Steven Stein; Clerk: William Trupek; Not reported. (302/JPT)
